scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently --kill-others -n "COMMITTEE,MINISTRY,AGENT,L2,BROKER" -c "cyan,green,magenta,blue,yellow" "npm run start:committee" "wait-on tcp:3004 && npm run start:ministry" "wait-on tcp:3001 && npm run start:agent" "wait-on tcp:3002 && npm run start:l2" "wait-on tcp:3001 tcp:3002 tcp:3003 tcp:3004 && npm run run:broker"
